Your Project Here

Get in touch to discuss your next production.

The Naked Truth TV Show

Produced by Greg Baker and Second Wind Music Productions, The Naked Truth was a half-hour showcase of great songs featuring the best local and regional singer-songwriters in the Charlotte area.

Videotaped at the Sylvia Theater in York, SC on the first Friday of each month, and aired the first Saturday of every month at 8:30 PM on Time Warner Access Channel 21.

Inquire About Production

"Makin' Silk Purses out of Silk!"
